name: mcpfinder
description: Discover and install MCP servers across the Official Registry, Glama, and Smithery.
long_description: MCPfinder is an AI-first discovery layer over the MCP ecosystem. It searches 25k+ servers across the Official MCP Registry, Glama, and Smithery, inspects trust signals and required secrets, and generates client-specific install config — so your AI can find and add the tools it is missing on demand.

tools.name: search_mcp_servers
tools.description: Find candidate MCP servers by keyword, technology, or use case.

query.description: Keyword, use case, or technology. Empty returns the most popular servers.

tools.name: get_server_details
tools.description: Inspect trust signals, tools, env vars, and warnings before recommending a server.

tools.name: get_install_config
tools.description: Generate a client-specific JSON config snippet for installation.

tools.name: browse_categories
tools.description: Browse the MCP ecosystem by domain category.

category.description: Optional category name; omit to list all categories.
